name: How do I avoid duplicate-location page problems in GEO?
description: Make each location page distinct in purpose, examples, and content so it is not just a copied template with a new city name.

mainEntity.name: How do I avoid duplicate-location page problems in GEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your site has multiple service areas, give each major city a page that answers a different user need. In Boulder or Salt Lake City, for example, one location may need a more technical or startup-focused angle than a broader metro page. The point is to make each page genuinely useful, not just locally named.
acceptedAnswer.description: Make each location page distinct in purpose, examples, and content so it is not just a copied template with a new city name.
